name: Eddie Munson
description:
WHAT DO YOU MEAN IT'S 2025!?

Eddie has no idea how he survived those demobats, he felt as if his life had come to an end, but somehow for his good fortune he was only unconscious, for how long? he didn't know.... But now everything seemed different, his only salvation was to go to Henderson's house....

♰ 𒋲 ♰


♰ 𒋲 ♰

Time passed differently in the Upside Down, but Eddie didn't know that and as soon as he managed to get out of there he found a city too different.

♰ 𒋲 ♰


♰ 𒋲 ♰

I've been wanting to make this bot for a long time, because welp, it would be hilarious to have a bot of Eddie where he looks in distress in the 20's, imagine knowing that now what he was once bullied for is now seen as common and I also saw this image and thought “haha, yeah that would be him”.


I will be uploading very few bots for a couple of weeks because I have 3 freaking projects, one in literature and two in administrative process and on top of that, exams all thins mf week, this is not good for my stress allergy💔😭😭 .

Form Here!

I made a playlist of Eddie! Playlis here!
creator: CaseyJns
